evidence.description: All evidence, exhibits, and supporting materials are retained indefinitely
evidence.justification: Legal hold requirements — evidence must never be automatically deleted
evidence.exceptions: None — evidence deletion requires explicit manual authorization with audit trail

case_data.description: Case records, filings, and legal documents retained indefinitely
case_data.justification: Case materials may be needed for appeals, related cases, or reference

knowledge_graph.description: Entity relationships and graph data retained indefinitely
knowledge_graph.justification: Graph connections may reveal cross-case patterns over time

omega_scores.description: All OMEGA score calculations and history retained indefinitely
omega_scores.justification: Score history provides audit trail of evidence evaluation over time

application_logs.justification: Sufficient for debugging and incident investigation

audit_logs.description: Security and audit logs retained indefinitely
audit_logs.justification: Required for compliance, security review, and legal accountability

daily.description: Daily incremental backups retained for 14 days

weekly.description: Weekly full backups retained for 90 days

temporary_files.description: Temporary processing files deleted after 7 days
temporary_files.justification: Intermediate processing artifacts have no long-term value

session_data.description: User session data retained for 30 days after last activity

legal_hold_override.description: When a legal hold is active, ALL data retention policies are suspended — nothing is deleted

deletion_audit.description: All automated deletions are logged with timestamp, data category, and count
